arts.ttl: Arsenal Set to Rival Man City, Man Utd for £64M-Rated PSG Outcast
arts.sum: With the January transfer window approaching, speculation about Randal Kolo Muani’s future at Paris Saint-Germain is growing, driven by his limited playing time this season. Randal’s situation worsened on Sunday when he was excluded from PSG’s matchday group against Olympique Lyonnais, casting further doubt on his place in Luis Enrique’s plans. The French forward has […] The post Arsenal Set to Rival Man City, Man Utd for £64M-Rated PSG Outcast appeared first on PSG Talk.
